summary: Frontend testing for theme consistency, GM Screen tabs, and World Map features. All tests passed - purple theme correctly applied to GM pages, Uploads tab removed from GM Screen, World Map features present.

issues: Uses gold/yellow (#F59E0B) color instead of purple - may be intentional to distinguish player-facing content
Uses #F59E0B for warning color and some pin types - these are semantic colors for location types, likely intentional

action_items: Consider changing Player Join Code panel in CampaignSettingTab from gold (#F59E0B) to purple (#8A2BE2) for full GM theme consistency
Dead code: GMScreen.js still has activeTab === 'uploads' check at line 1170 but tab is correctly removed from tabs array - can be cleaned up
critical_code_review_comments: WorldMapTab.js has all required features: mode buttons (View, Add Pin, Move Pin, Line Path, Draw Path, Travel), grid selector (Square/Hex/Diamond), Upload Map button
GMScreen.js correctly has 12 tabs without Uploads: Combat, Location, NPCs, NPC Network, Monsters, Tables, Loot, Dice, Party, Notes, Story Arcs, Soundboard
UnifiedDashboard.js correctly implements dual theme: purple for GM side, cyan for Player side
CalendarTab.js uses purple (#8A2BE2) theme - no pink colors found
MapsConsolidatedTab.js uses purple gradient styling for sub-tabs
context_for_next_testing_agent: All theme and feature tests passed. GM Screen has 12 tabs (no Uploads). World Map toolbar buttons only appear when a map is uploaded. Homepage correctly shows purple GM side and cyan Player side.

world_map_features.notes: Mode buttons and grid selector only visible when a map is uploaded
